summary: Completed testing of Google Auth integration, societies page redesign, and trending ticker functionality. Frontend UI elements working well but backend API endpoints failing with 404 errors and trending ticker not visible.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 instead of handling POST requests
Returns 404 instead of returning activities array

ui_bugs.issue: Button has stability issues during automated testing (may be disabled state logic)

integration_issues.issue: Trending ticker not visible on societies page despite being in code
Google Auth buttons present but API endpoint non-functional

passed_tests: Login page loads at /login with 'Continue with Google' button visible above email form
Login page has 'OR SIGN IN WITH EMAIL' divider between Google button and email form
Login page Google button has Google logo icon (colored G)
Login page left panel uses solid dark navy background (not gradient)
Signup page loads at /signup with 'Continue with Google' button
Signup page has 'OR SIGN UP WITH EMAIL' divider
Auth callback page exists at /auth/callback (redirects properly when no session)
Societies page loads at /societies with dark navy header
Societies page has search input, category filter pills (All, Arts & Culture, Academic, Music, Sports & Fitness, Debate & Speaking, Social)
Societies page shows 'No societies found' when empty
Societies page has 'COMMUNITY' badge and 'TCD Societies' heading
Landing page hero section still works at /
Login form validation still works (email + password required)
Design successfully uses solid backgrounds instead of gradients
Professional redesign achieved with clean navy header and geometric accents
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix API route handlers - /api/auth/google and /api/activity/trending both return 404. Investigate why Next.js API routes are not working. Also investigate why trending ticker is not visible on societies page despite code being present.
success_percentage: frontend: 85% (UI complete, integration blocked by backend), backend: 0% (all API endpoints failing)
